items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Iran Attacks Gulf Nations, Further Straining Cease-Fire
items.summary: On the same day Secretary of State Marco Rubio told lawmakers the Iran war was “concluded,” Tehran launched a barrage of missiles and drones toward Bahrain and Kuwait.
